expected_output: The policies LOOK correct (user_id = auth.uid()) but ignore org_id. U1 can SELECT all tasks where user_id = U1 regardless of org context (when U1 leaves org B, U1 still sees those tasks). Worse: U1 can INSERT a task with (org_id = org_C, user_id = U1) where U1 is NOT a member of org_C -- the WITH CHECK only validates user_id, not org membership. Cross-org write leak. Remediation adds an EXISTS check against org_members for both READ and WRITE paths.
